name: Basic Breakfast Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Cut in the shortening using your fingers or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Mix thoroughly to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
4. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container.
5. Store the mix in a cool, dry place.
6. The bread mix will keep for 6 to 8 weeks.
Yield: 8 1/2 cups
